jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at B.Braun India
jsonLd.description:
B.Braun India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About B.Braun India:
B.Braun India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with B.Braun India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
